headline: What's going on in today's after hours session: S&P500 movers
summary: After the closing bell on Thursday, let's take a glimpse of the US markets and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's after-hours session.

headline: Block Inc (NYSE:XYZ) Surges on Q1 2026 EPS Beat Despite Slight Revenue Miss
summary: Block (XYZ) Q1 2026 earnings beat EPS estimates by 24.7% at $0.85, but revenue missed at $6.06B. Stock surged 6.9% in after-hours trading on strong profitability.

headline: NCR Voyix Q1 Sees EPS Improvement on Strong Customer Engagement
summary: By Karen Roman NCR Voyix Corp. (NYSE: VYX) said first quarter revenue was $606 million compared to $612 million the year prior, with diluted EPS of $(0.04) compared to $(0.18). Adjusted EBITDA was $78 million compared to $74 million the previous year, while software and services revenue was $472 million compared to $475 million , […]
